onboarding_message: Here's your profile! It's a bit empty — fill it out to increase your chances of finding the perfect teammate!
edit_description: 📝 Tell us shortly about yourself. What gamestyle do you prefer or what rank are you in specific game :)
edit_age: Type in your age as numbers:
edit_communication: Describe your preffered way to communicate. For example Discord, TeamSpeak or ingame chat
edit_avatar: Upload your profile picture or even a short video!
chose_spoken_language: Chose languages, which you speak in games:
